events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / high risk**. Honeycombing indicates missed vibration/inadequate consolidation — a defective, non-compliant condition requiring the affected placement to stop, engineering evaluation of extent (sounding/coring per ACI 301), a defined repair method (removal-and-replace, dry-pack, or epoxy injection), and correction of vibration technique per ACI 304 before placement resumes or the element is accepted.
